name: @yesid/motion
description: Pure brand motion actions extracted byte-faithful from yesid.dev @ 2bdb611d. Snappy Doctrine vocabulary (Tier 1): boop, magnetic, cursorGlow, sectionGlow, cardParallax, pressBounce, wordmarkHover + sectionMagnet. morphHover/scrollChain stay app-side (Tier 2).
//: Runtime contract: consumers opt in to @yesid/tokens/tokens.css — magnetic/boop/cursorGlow reference --duration-*/--ease-bounce/--primary-rgb CSS custom properties at runtime. src/tokens.ts is generated by the root token build (do not hand-edit). The two-tier tap-press system's Layer 1 baseline is available as the optional @yesid/motion/tap-feedback.css public import and remains copyable; the package ships zero automatic or app-conditional CSS.
// 0.4.0: Adds the reconciled shared GSAP ticker fan-out utility used by transit and yesid.dev; MOTION-1 app-only GSAP plugins, morphHover, scrollChain, and scrubs remain excluded.
